explanation.risk_narrative: The store exhibits strong shelf density (0.9) and a mass-dominant brand mix, suggesting a well-stocked inventory tailored for a budget-conscious customer base. Despite this, the location is poorly positioned, characterized by a very low footfall score (0.0385) and intense competition from 13 nearby stores within a small catchment area. These location disadvantages, coupled with a HIGH risk band and an active fraud flag, significantly undermine the reliability of the estimated monthly revenue (₹117,000 - ₹170,200). Consequently, lending is not recommended due to the combination of poor demand signals and critical integrity concerns.
